_comment_privacy_audit: privacy-audit: allow-file — author + owner metadata. No user data.
name: zeref-os
description: Zeref OS — local-first context and memory engine for AI-assisted work. Harness-agnostic, model-agnostic, privacy-first.

plugins.name: zeref-os
plugins.description: Local-first context + memory engine. Per-project flat memory, append-only pattern log, snapshots, on-demand team packs. Inspired by Zeref Dragneel — keeper of ancient knowledge across forms.
